title: VertexEditor
body:
# (to access to the menu, press RSHIFT)
VertexEditor – Advanced Terrain Editing for Minecraft (Forge)

The VertexEditor mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 provides users with a **strong terrain editing tool** which enables them to create **terrain changes through simple and direct methods.** The building and mapping tools of this mod allow users to create **in-game worlds through its advanced brush-based editing system** which was inspired after **terrain editors software.**

*VertexEditor enables you to create smooth natural terrain for your custom maps and landscapes and your extensive projects because it gives you complete control over terrain shaping.*

# Features
- **Brush Tool** lets users change terrain at their desired size and strength.
- **Smooth terrain tool** enables users to instantly create smooth surfaces by applying it to rough and unbalanced landforms.
- **The Eraser** lets users delete specific terrain elements while leaving the rest of the area untouched.
- The **Surface Painter** tool enables users to paint blocks directly onto the surface of the terrain.
- The **Wall Builder** tool enables users to create walls which maintain a uniform and good appearance.
- **Flatten Tool** enables users to create building areas which have uniform height through its ability to flatten land to a specific elevation.

# Why VertexEditor?
- The system enables users to manipulate terrain quickly while maintaining productivity.
- Serves as the perfect tool for builders and map makers and server admins.
- and it allows users to carry out precise work on terrain projects.
- VertexEditor support **forge**, this makes it **unique** and (perhaps) the **only choice for effectively modifying terrain** for Forge.

**The VertexEditor transforms Minecraft into an authentic landscape design tool which gives users complete artistic control over their creative work.**
# Credits:
[ImGUI-java](https://github.com/SpaiR/imgui-java) by SpaiR (integrated into the mod) 
- **Found a bug? feel free to join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/YpdZBux6x7)**
